---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Imranalimohammed-AI
---

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like implemented.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Security Considerations
Does this feature introduce new inputs, credentials, or external calls? How should they be handled?

## Additional Context
Mockups, examples, or related issues.
